name: result_faces
description: Two expressive result placeholders, one family: WIN — a big glossy gold star with a cheerful smiling face, arms-up celebratory sparkle burst around it; FAIL — the same star dimmed to grey-blue with a sad face, a single crack across one point, drooping slightly.
prompt_extra: same star character silhouette in both cells; simple dot-and-curve face only (no limbs, no species); the emotion carries the scene

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
